scripts.dev: npm run build -w @platform/shared && concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,blue "npm run dev -w @platform/web" "npm run dev -w @platform/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @platform/shared && npm run build -w @platform/web && npm run build -w @platform/api
scripts.test: npm run build -w @platform/shared && npm run test -w @platform/shared && npm run test -w @platform/web && npm run test -w @platform/api
